selection_rationale: Selected based on: (1) emotional impact at first glance, (2) thumbnail readability, (3) narrative incompleteness that rewards viewing, (4) medium-concept harmony, (5) avoidance of AI art clichés, (6) competition viability

selected_pairs.title: The Door Left Open
selected_pairs.why_selected: Strongest threshold imagery. Back-lit silhouette is immediately striking. The tension between leaving and staying is universal. Tempera's matte quality perfect for stillness.
selected_pairs.emotional_core: The weight of a decision unmade
selected_pairs.thumbnail_hook: High contrast silhouette against bright doorway

selected_pairs.title: His Father's Chair
selected_pairs.medium: Oil on canvas with visible brushwork
selected_pairs.why_selected: REVISED to remove figure — empty chair as portrait is more powerful and less literal. The leather wear-marks tell decades of story. Richest texture opportunity.
selected_pairs.emotional_core: Presence in absence — the shape a life leaves
selected_pairs.thumbnail_hook: Golden afternoon light on empty leather chair

selected_pairs.title: The Meal Set for Two
selected_pairs.why_selected: Hopper's DNA is perfect here. The tender acceptance rather than tragedy elevates it. Burned-down candles and dust are visually specific. Two-person composition creates natural focal hierarchy.
selected_pairs.thumbnail_hook: Warm candlelight on woman's face, empty place setting

selected_pairs.title: Mother's Hands, Flour Dusted
selected_pairs.why_selected: Close-crop intimacy is unexpected for competitions. The paused hands with wedding ring is immediately readable. Chardin's treatment of domestic sacred is timeless.
selected_pairs.emotional_core: The pause when the body remembers what the mind tried to forget
selected_pairs.thumbnail_hook: Weathered hands on flour, single sharp wedding ring

selected_pairs.title: The Photograph in the Drawer
selected_pairs.why_selected: The withheld image is a powerful device — we see only the white back. Richter's blur language is sophisticated but accessible. The posture carries the emotion.
selected_pairs.emotional_core: The past held but not looked at
selected_pairs.thumbnail_hook: Sharp hands holding blurred white rectangle, slumped posture

selected_pairs.title: The Book She Stopped Reading
selected_pairs.why_selected: The pre-dawn blue palette is distinctive. The fallen bookmark is a perfect narrative detail. Kawauchi's gentle light is deeply NightCafe-friendly.
selected_pairs.thumbnail_hook: Pre-dawn blue light on sleeping face, book open beside her

eliminated_concepts.reason: Fogged mirror is too common in AI art
Surreal elements too overt for 'familiar uncanny'
